name: vidroop-download
author: Lucas 'punteroo' Maza
description: Vidroop browser extension with HLS download and browser-only conversion.

scripts.check: node --check content.js && node --check background.js && node --check popup.js && node --check conversion.worker.js
scripts.build:check: yarn build && node --check dist/content.js && node --check dist/background.js && node --check dist/popup.js && node --check dist/conversion.worker.js
